gist.headline: Picture perfect previews
gist.blurb: OGP Maker has sprouted in the community greenhouse! Generate perfect Open Graph images for your links so they look sharp when shared on social media.
gist.summary: Added OGP Maker to the community apps showcase, providing a dedicated tool to generate Open Graph images for social media platforms.
gist.impact: Creators can now easily discover and use a community-built tool for generating perfectly sized preview cards for Facebook and X.
gist.visual_concept: OGP (Open Graph Protocol) is all about social media preview cards. The visual should feature the bee creating or holding a tiny social media preview card (a rectangle with an image and text layout). A painter's easel fits the 'maker' vibe.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a miniature social media preview card on a wooden easel in a digital garden. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
